title: WynnerCraft
body:
Wynnercraft is a compact modpack for the Wynncraft server. It includes performance and quality of life mods.

Included mods:
- Wynntils: A must have when playing wynncraft, lots of utilities
- BetterAdvancements: Larger view of the territory map
- BetterF3, Mod Menu: in the name
- Inventory HUD+: always see the contents of your inventory, useful when doing professions
- ChatPatches: A better chatting experience with 32k message history and a larger chat window
- Sodium, Sodium Extra, Reese's Sodium options, Lithium, FerriteCore: Performance
- No Chat Reports: avoid being banned by microsoft for arbitrary reasons: turn off chat encryption and reports
- Iris: Shader support
- Dynamic FPS: Less resource usage when not in focus

Voices of Wynn is an optional mod that should be included at the discretion of the individual; it is not included in this pack because it's large file size.

My own Wynntils config is available in the wynntils_config.txt, it can be loaded in the Wynntils settings, by putting the file content on the clipboard and pressing the import button.
